title: Repository, Python Runtime, Dependencies, Parsers, and Reproducibility · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed crawl review reconstructs repository, python runtime, dependencies, parsers, and reproducibility from authorization, revision, seed, URL key, response identity, robots decision, parse record, extraction provenance, frontier event, report row, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for reproducible crawler repository baseline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging…
objectives: Inspect revision, status, existing behavior, tests, configuration, data fixtures, licenses, secrets, and a recovery anchor before editing.
Record Python implementation and version, platform, SSL backend, event-loop assumptions, encoding environment, and supported runtime matrix.
Pin direct and resolved dependencies, verify hashes and sources, review licenses and advisories, and prove clean installation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

stimulus.title: Environment Reproducibility case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review site-quality team handles case 2332 during an authorized nonprofit content audit. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile revision, runtime, dependency, parser, license, advisory, and clean-environment evidence; the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure; then introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Recreate the tool from a clean environment and reconcile versions, fixtures, default configuration, output digest, and shutdown state. Artifact under review: reproducible crawler repository baseline.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Environment Reproducibility, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Environment Reproducibility record says reproducible crawler repository baseline looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Environment Reproducibility.

For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner authorization, revision, URL and robots policy, response budgets, parser and selector limits, provenance, frontier and concurrency evidence, changed fixtures, privacy, security, accessibility, stop, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as crawler proof. This does not satisfy Environment Reproducibility for reproducible crawler repository baseline.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Recreate the tool from a clean environment and reconcile versions, fixtures, default configuration, output digest, and shutdown state.
